activation.method: subagent router judged 15 realistic user messages against the SKILL.md description
activation.notes: 10 in-scope (IEM/HP/TWS eval, DAC素质/drivability, screenshot, no-measurement, conflict, dedup, marketing, style-split) -> activate; buying-rec/EQ/speaker -> reject; fictional model + snake-oil DAC -> activate (handled at runtime).

behavioral.method: subagent executed synthesis+self-verify on two prepared cases; outputs independently re-validated with scripts/validate_output.py

checks: bilingual literary does not exceed facts
'warmer/analog' review logged as unsupported subjective (confidence 0.1) with dissent note

deterministic_regression: evals/run_all.py GREEN (L0 schema + L1 golden both engines + determinism + output gate + token budget)
limitations: targets.json band_levels_db are seed approximations (see research-bibliography.md); agent-level pass@k / cost-per-success at scale and a full with/without-skill paired lift remain future work.
